TITLE: Technical Architecture Note

This document describes an architecture design with multiple sections and operational considerations.
It contains sufficient technical detail and length to exceed minimum token thresholds for quality scoring.
It includes procedures, controls, and configuration considerations for IAM and PAM.

Architecture details
- Define trust boundaries, identity providers, and policy decision points.
- Document integration flows for Entra ID, CyberArk, and Zscaler components.
- Specify network segments, firewall rules, and service-to-service authentication patterns.

Operational details
- Provide a step-by-step runbook for onboarding privileged accounts and rotating credentials.
- Define monitoring signals and SIEM correlation rules for suspicious authentication events.
- Include evidence artifacts, log retention expectations, and audit trail requirements.

Testing and validation
- Validate access control policies with negative and positive test cases.
- Confirm break-glass procedures and incident response escalation paths.
- Verify configuration drift detection and change approval workflows.
